title: <div>I only wish we’d spent more time getting better vocal takes on my verses fo
content:
I only wish we’d spent more time getting better vocal takes on my verses for that one

A:
Oh man it's so dope, I also wish we could've elevated the production a bit. But we live and learn

D:
I think the production sounds so good on every other track. Entropy I think I got lazy with my performance. And Victory, we prolly should have re-recorded at your place (instead of using the takes we did at Nick’s). All in all tho, really solid stuff
I learned so much from you about recording and progressing from beat maker to Producer
During that process

A:
Ah man, I need to get back to that space
I miss making music so much. Been sidelined by the grind of trying to survive 😮‍💨

D:
Oh shit you got bars now too?

A:
😭😭😭

D:
Sidelined by the grind’a tryna survive

A:
Not too bad actually haha
But it's been like I don't know five years since I released an album, I feel like I really need to say some shit and sonically and lyrically
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 9 (chunk 9/10)
